prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为18601→17948→18796→22966→23894，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2024年新高考改革后位次明显下滑，2025年基准约23894名，近两年累计后移约5100名；本省物理类计划2021年510人、2022年501人、2023年511人、2024年539人、2025年581人，逐年扩招；2026年计划591人，较2025年增加10人（+1.7%），扩招趋势延续，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在79–83区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考）；2026年声誉仍偏负面（学术不端事件通报）；抖音热度总排名第77位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等偏低，报考关注度未显著升温；管理科学与工程获评A级（第五轮学科评估），为该校唯一A-及以上学科；工科整体实力较强，机械工程、电气工程等专业在省内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，但土木建筑、生化环材等呈劝退趋势；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年（约46.2万）略有减少，物理类估算约31.3万人，竞争压力小幅缓解，2025年物理类本科批461分，近年波动不大；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省内，属本省招生，本地考生报考意愿较强；该校在本省招生占比高，2025年物理类计划581人占全校主要份额，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+1.7%）、声誉偏负面信号及安徽省考生总数略减等因素，考虑声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情，结合考生总数略减的抵消作用，小幅上调50名；预测最低位次约24191名，区间23691–24691名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18601 → 17948 → 18796 → 22966 → 23894, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. Especially after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, rankings significantly declined. The 2025 baseline is approximately 23894, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5100 in the last two years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 510 in 2021, 501 in 2022, 511 in 2023, 539 in 2024, and 581 in 2025, expanding year by year. The 2026 plan is 591, an increase of 10 (+1.7%) compared to 2025, continuing the expansion trend with slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (hot majors' admission scores plummeted, some majors had no applicants). In 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative (reports of academic misconduct). Douyin popularity total ranking is 77th (rated 'average'), with moderately low short video exposure, and application attention has not significantly heated up. Management Science and Engineering received an A grade (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at this university. Engineering overall is relatively strong, with majors like Mechanical Engineering and Electrical Engineering having high recognition within the province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity, but Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials and other majors show a trend of being discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Anhui college entrance examination takers is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 in 2025. Physics Category is estimated at about 313,000 people, with slightly eased competition pressure. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 461 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, recruiting within the province, with strong local candidates' willingness to apply. The university has a high proportion of provincial enrollment; in 2025, the Physics Category plan of 581 people accounts for the main share of the school, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+1.7%), the somewhat negative reputation signals, and the slight decrease in the total number of Anhui candidates, taking into account that the somewhat negative reputation may suppress some application enthusiasm, offset by the slight decrease in total candidates, a small upward adjustment of 50 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24191, with a range of 23691–24691.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Material Forming and Control Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics)
- Economics
- Environmental Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23691–24691, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 23000), focus on reaching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering. For rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 24500), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次依次为4915→4656→4361→5070→5358，2021–2023年呈小幅上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年新高考改革后位次明显后移，2025年基准约5358名；本省文科/历史类计划2021–2023年均为65人，2024–2025年降至61人；2026年计划51人，较2025年减少10人（-16.4%），缩招幅度显著，竞争明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第80名，属中上水平综合性大学，文科招生规模较小但学校层次对文科考生仍有吸引力；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；2026年声誉仍偏负面（学术不端事件）；抖音热度总排名第77位（评价"一般"），文科相关专业曝光量有限；管理科学与工程A级，但该校文科专业（英语、网络与新媒体）与优势学科关联度较低；文科整体实力相对工科偏弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 英语/外语类专业社会热度一般观望，网络与新媒体属新闻传播大类，社会热度明显劝退；安徽省2026年历史类考生估算约13.8万人，较2025年（14.14万）略有减少；省控线2025年历史类本科批477分，近年波动不大；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省内，本省招生占比高；文科招生专业仅英语和网络与新媒体两个，选择面窄，但学校层次对省内文科中分段考生仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅缩招（-16.4%）、声誉偏负面及考生总数略减等因素，考虑缩招使位次明显前移（更易进），但声誉偏负面和外语/新传专业热度偏低形成一定抵消，小幅下调30名；预测最低位次约4801名，区间4301–5301名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 4915 → 4656 → 4361 → 5070 → 5358, showing a slight upward trend from 2021 to 2023 (decreasing ranking numbers). After the 2024 new college entrance exam reform, rankings significantly shifted backward, with a baseline of approximately 5358 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 65 from 2021 to 2023, dropping to 61 from 2024 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 51, a decrease of 10 (-16.4%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and a notable easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a mid-to-upper level comprehensive university with a small liberal arts enrollment scale, but the university level still attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors). In 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident). Douyin heat ranking is 77th (rated 'average'), with limited exposure for liberal arts-related majors. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, but the university's liberal arts majors (English, Network and New Media) have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines. Overall liberal arts strength is relatively weak compared to engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of English/foreign language majors is generally lukewarm; Network and New Media belongs to the journalism and communication category, with social popularity clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Anhui Province is about 138,000, slightly decreasing from 2025 (141,400). The provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 477 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment. Liberal arts majors are limited to English and Network and New Media, offering a narrow selection, but the university level still attracts mid-range liberal arts candidates within the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of backward rankings in recent years, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-16.4%), somewhat negative reputation, and a slight decrease in total examinees, the enrollment reduction significantly shifts rankings forward (easier to enter), but the somewhat negative reputation and low popularity of foreign language/new media majors create a partial offset, with a slight downward adjustment of 30 places. Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4801, with a range of 4301 to 5301.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university offers only two liberal arts majors, English and Network and New Media, with a small enrollment scale (51 total in 2026). The historical ranking for English is slightly better than for Network and New Media. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the 4301–4801 range prioritize English and use Network and New Media as a safety option. Candidates with rankings in the 4801–5301 range can safely apply to both majors.
